top_stories.title: Euro Motor celebrates 20th anniversary at Makina Moto Expo 2026
top_stories.summary: PASAY CITY, Philippines — Euro Motor, a pioneer in providing accessible and dependable mobility for Filipinos, marked a historic milestone at the Makina Moto Expo 2026. The event served as the brand’s official debut at the prestigious expo, coinciding with its 20th anniversary of operations in the Philippines.

secondary_signals.title: Here comes the electrified Honda Prelude
secondary_signals.summary: HONDA Cars Philippines (HCPI) has finally lifted the curtain on the much‑awaited Prelude e:HEV, now armed with the S+ Shift feature. First seen as a concept at the 2023 Japan Mobility Show, the production model emerges as an electrified grand tourer—seamlessly blending nostalgic heritage with cutting‑edge technology...

secondary_signals.title: Electric vehicle buying frenzy; 6 Changans
secondary_signals.summary: THE successive astronomical spikes in diesel/gas prices caused by the Middle East conflict has seemingly sparked a buying frenzy for electric vehicles (EV), if not hybrid cars (a combination of fossil fuel, battery and motor).

secondary_signals.title: Lexus spin on charging stations
secondary_signals.summary: CHARGING stations have always been a perennial issue for Filipino motorists wishing to own an electric vehicle (EV). Where to charge your EV with ease and comfort has been a nagging question that, on many occasions, has riled EV dreamers, forcing many to quit dreaming.

secondary_signals.title: Airport improvement continues; electrified Toyota
secondary_signals.summary: Motorists heading to Ninoy Aquino International Airport (Naia) Terminal 3 from the Skyway can now save about 15 to 25 minutes following the opening of a new off-ramp linking the NAIA Expressway directly to the terminal.
